option.name: requestToText
option.value:
<CachedHttpClientTabRequests> <entry key="6a3840d32df3ab86c7d4745303b2bf460ea83542" value="###
POST http://localhost:8084/auth/signin
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "email": "",
 "password": ""
}" /> <entry key="883d9f8e30c8dc09e575480d629e6f77eb303a62" value="###
POST http://localhost:8084/api/v1/auth/signin
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "email": "",
 "password": ""
}" /> <entry key="3c0f8fb495cd5c597af3628e0b7b4091ccb96584" value="###
POST http://localhost:8084/auth/signup
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "email": "",
 "password": "",

}" /> </CachedHttpClientTabRequests>
